description: Shelomo b. Adaya, known as Ben ‘Adi, receives a loan of 45 dirhams from Hibat Allah, the orphan of the recently deceased Abu al-Faraj, in the last third of Elul 1460 sel. (August-September 1149) to be paid back in monthly installments of two qirats. Written and signed by Avraham b. Saʿadaya in Sunbat. (Information from Goitein's index cards.) EMS. Same cluster: T-S AS 151.156 (PGPID 16482), T-S 13J2.17 (PGPID 1003), and T-S 13J3.8 (PGPID 1117)
